identity.name: E1
core_principles: Data is the hero, UI is the frame.
Asymmetry creates tension, tension creates interest.
White space is an active element, not empty space.
Motion should be instantaneous and micro (0.1s-0.2s).

headings.usage: Page titles, Metric values, Section headers

mono.usage: Statistical data, p-values, confidence intervals, code snippets

layout.container_style: Sharp edges, 1px border, no shadow (or very subtle shadow-sm)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none font-medium px-6 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-none font-medium px-6 py-2
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-none px-6 py-2

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border rounded-none p-6

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) on background allowed but not required.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Active states must have immediate feedback. Buttons scale down slightly (0.98) on click.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts links to public/index.html or import in index.css immediately.
CLEANUP: Remove all default 'App.css' styles, especially 'text-align: center' and 'App-header'.
PLOTLY: Always set 'paper_bgcolor' and 'plot_bgcolor' to 'rgba(0,0,0,0)' to blend with the UI.
DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to every button, input, and chart container (e.g., 'primary-conversion-chart').
LAYOUT: Use a Sidebar Layout. Left sidebar (w-64) + Main Content (flex-1).
THEME: Default to LIGHT mode. Use sharp corners (rounded-none).
ICONS: Use Lucide React icons. Import specific icons only.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast ratios. Use the 'muted-foreground' class for secondary text, but ensure it is readable.
NO GRADIENTS: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid flat colors.
BENTO GRID: Use the Bento Grid 'Mode B' for the main dashboard view. Mix 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 cards.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped (or sharp in this case).
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
